episodes.title: FULL EPSTEIN ROUNDTABLE: Survivors, Ro Khanna, Jayapal, Summer & Giuffre Family Speak Out | AB1E
episodes.description:
WATCH LIVE as Representative Ro Khanna (CA-17), co-author of the Epstein Files Transparency Act, hosted a powerful roundtable in Washington, D.C., bringing together Epstein survivors, families of Virginia Giuffre, advocacy groups, and legal voices calling for accountability and transparency.

The session focused on survivor testimonies, justice reform efforts, and renewed demands for full disclosure of Epstein-related documents.

This high-profile gathering highlights growing political pressure in Congress surrounding transparency legislation and victim advocacy.

Stay tuned for breaking U.S. political news, congressional hearings, and justice reform updates.

episodes.title: Capitol Hill Shock: Epstein Victims Demand Action From Trump, Andrew & UK Royal Family | AB1E
episodes.description:
Epstein survivors and advocates are speaking out in Washington, calling for accountability from global figures linked to the scandal, including Donald Trump and Prince Andrew. During the event, pressure intensified on King Charles III to meet survivors during his U.S. visit and publicly acknowledge their experiences. The discussion also highlighted the broader fight for justice surrounding the Jeffrey Epstein case, including calls for transparency, release of remaining files, and renewed investigations. Survivors emphasized accountability, systemic failures, and the need for international cooperation in addressing historic abuse allegations.

episodes.title: Bank of America’s $72.5M Epstein Settlement Wins Preliminary Approval in Manhattan Court | AB15
episodes.description:
-A U.S. judge granted preliminary approval on Thursday, April 2, 2026, to Bank of America’s $72.5 million settlement with women who accused the bank of facilitating their sexual abuse by Jeffrey Epstein.

The hearing, presided over by U.S. District Judge Jed Rakoff in Manhattan, sets the stage for a final approval hearing scheduled for August 27. Lawyers representing the victims estimate that 60 to 75 women may submit claims, primarily from the United States and Eastern Europe.

The settlement follows previous resolutions with other financial institutions, including JPMorgan Chase ($290M) and Deutsche Bank ($75M), addressing allegations that these banks ignored warning signs about Epstein’s sex trafficking operations.

Bank of America maintains that it did not facilitate Epstein’s crimes, but agreed to settle to provide closure to the accusers. The plaintiffs’ attorneys may seek up to 30% of the settlement (~$21.8 million) in legal fees.

Judge Rakoff emphasized that while compensation is important for victims, entities that were inadvertently linked to Epstein without participating in or benefiting from his misconduct should not be unfairly penalized.

episodes.title: WATCH: French Police Raid Arab World Institute in Paris as Epstein Probe Expands | AC15
episodes.description:
French police have raided the Arab World Institute (Institut du Monde Arabe) in Paris as part of a financial probe linked to former president Jack Lang and his past connections to convicted U.S. sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

The search was confirmed by France’s National Financial Prosecutor’s Office (PNF) following the release of new Epstein-related documents in the United States.

Authorities are investigating potential tax-related issues involving Lang and his daughter. Lang, who led the Arab World Institute since 2013, resigned earlier this month. He has denied any wrongdoing and stated he was unaware of Epstein’s criminal activities despite past correspondence.

Video shows:

• Police outside the Arab World Institute in Paris
• Journalists gathered at the scene
• Archive footage of Jack Lang and Jeffrey Epstein together in March 2019
• File images of Lang at official events, including appearances with French President Emmanuel Macron and former U.S. President Joe Biden

The investigation is part of broader international fallout following the release of millions of Epstein-related documents.

#BreakingNews #Paris #EpsteinFiles #JackLang #ArabWorldInstitute #FranceNews #FinancialProbe #JeffreyEpstein #FrenchPolitics #InternationalInvestigation #GlobalNews #EuropeBreaking

episodes.title: FULL: Epstein Survivors, Dem Women Blasts Trump & Bondi, Call Out GOP & Justice Over Epstein | AC1E
episodes.description:
Survivors of Jeffrey Epstein’s trafficking ring, joined by members of the Democratic Women’s Caucus, delivered emotional and forceful remarks demanding accountability from the Trump administration, Attorney General Pam Bondi, and Republican lawmakers over the handling of newly released Epstein files.

Speakers accused the Department of Justice of failing to protect victims, exposing survivors’ personal information, and shielding powerful figures connected to Epstein.

Key moments:

• Survivors share painful personal testimonies
• Calls for full investigations into Epstein’s associates
• DOJ criticized for file redactions and privacy failures
• Lawmakers demand answers from AG Pam Bondi
• Bipartisan calls for justice and transparency
• “They should be ashamed” – fiery condemnation of leadership

Watch the full press conference and complete remarks.
